description: Uploads the same lipid PDF twice with byte-identical content and asserts copilot_document_sha_index has exactly one row for (patient_id, sha256) and documents has exactly one row.
what_bug_this_catches: If the SHA dedup branch in upload_common.php ever fails to short-circuit addNewDocument(), the documents table accumulates duplicates. This case uploads the same fixture twice and asserts copilot_document_sha_index has exactly one row for (patient_id, sha256) and documents has exactly one row.
